risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Service Provider Contracting
risk_summary: Governance fragility is preventing timely contract renewal and award processes for health service providers, directly disrupting service delivery across provinces.
evidence_quote: None of the 31 provincial contracts had been extended or awarded to new service providers ahead of the contract expiration date of June 30, 2021.

risk_title: Government Payment System Breakdown Threatening Service Delivery
risk_summary: Institutional capacity collapse within MOPH is causing severe delays in provider payments, undermining the sustainability of health service delivery and threatening project outcomes.
evidence_quote: Challenges in the timely handling of service provider contracts and payments by MOPH have placed health service delivery at risk... only 47% of service providers received timely and complete payments since the last ISR archived on April 30, 2021.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating Persisting
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' at both approval and current assessment, indicating sustained fragility affecting project implementation environment.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]
